pr.title: Port over most remaining dolphin code from SMS / oot-gc
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Large Dolphin SDK matching PR that ported most remaining unmatched Dolphin library code from SMS-decomp, with Odemu taken from oot-gc because SMS lacked it. The build configuration flipped many Dolphin objects from NonMatching to Matching, including OdemuExi2, dvderror, mtx/mtxvec/vec, OSReboot, OSResetSW, OSSerial, and vi. The decomp.dev bot reported 40 new matches, +12676 matched code bytes, and +19924 linked code bytes. The PR body states that after this, the only remaining Dolphin code was THPDec, and the only unmatched MSL code was logf.

key_files.why: Changed multiple Dolphin objects from NonMatching to Matching, making the ported code count toward the matched build.
Largest source change; matched SI serial transfer/type/polling logic and introduced named BSS symbols such as XferTime, TypeCallback, RDSTHandler, InputBuffer, InputBufferVcount, and cmdFixDevice.
Ported Odemu/debug EXI code from oot-gc, producing matches for DBRead, DBWrite, DBQueryData, DBInitInterrupts, DBGEXIImm, DBGRead, DBGWrite, and related helpers.
Added matched paired-single implementations such as PSMTXRotTrig and PSMTXQuat.
Adjusted vector routines, including PSVECMag naming and implementation.
Ported VI code sufficiently for VIConfigure and VIInit to become fully matched.
Ported __OSReboot to a matching implementation and corrected its header signature.
Matched reset switch handling, including OSGetResetButtonState and __OSResetSWInterruptHandler.
Refactored DVD error-code storage to use OSSramEx->dvdErrorCode and a static Convert helper.
Updated C_/PS macro aliases and prototypes for VECMag/PSVECMag/C_VECMag and MTXRotTrig/PSMTXRotTrig/C_MTXRotTrig.
Moved core interrupt typedefs into a common OS header before including OSContext-dependent declarations.
Corrected OSSramEx layout by splitting a padding field into dvdErrorCode plus padding.
Renamed and split symbols/data labels to match the newly ported source, including PSVECMag, string labels, timing/taps, and OSSerial BSS objects.
Small MSL math addition connected to reducing remaining unmatched MSL work; PR body says only logf remained unmatched afterward.

what_changed: Ported most remaining Dolphin SDK source from SMS-decomp because the PR author found SMS's already matched code very similar to Melee's remaining Dolphin code and close in style to this project.
Used oot-gc as the source for Odemu because the PR body says Odemu was absent from SMS but matched oot-gc's code.

Marked many Dolphin objects as Matching in configure.py: dolphin/odenotstub/odenotstub.c, dolphin/dvd/dvderror.c, dolphin/mtx/mtx.c, dolphin/mtx/mtxvec.c, dolphin/mtx/vec.c, dolphin/os/OSReboot.c, dolphin/os/OSResetSW.c, dolphin/os/OSSerial.c, and dolphin/vi/vi.c.

Expanded and corrected Dolphin headers: odemu prototypes were given concrete argument and return types; OS interrupt typedefs moved from OSInterrupt.h into os.h; __OSReboot signature changed from BOOL forceMenu to u32 bootDol; OSSerial gained SIIsChanBusy, SIRegisterPollingHandler, SIUnregisterPollingHandler, and an OSTime delay parameter; vitypes gained VI_TVMODE_3.
Corrected OSSramEx layout by replacing one padding byte pair with dvdErrorCode plus padding, allowing __DVDStoreErrorCode to write sram->dvdErrorCode instead of raw byte offset 36.
Updated mtx.h to expose C_VECMag/PSVECMag and C_MTXRotTrig/PSMTXRotTrig under the same C-versus-PS macro scheme as the rest of the matrix/vector API.

Updated GALE01 symbols to reflect new names and data shapes, including renaming VECMag to PSVECMag, tagging __sincos_on_quadrant as float data, splitting string blobs into individual labels, splitting OSSerial BSS objects, and resizing regs/shdwRegs and SendCount.

Bot results showed 40 new function matches. Named examples include VIConfigure, SIInterruptHandler, CompleteTransfer, DBGEXIImm, OSGetResetButtonState, GetTypeCallback, DBWrite, __OSReboot, SIGetType, VIInit, SIGetTypeAsync, SITransfer, SIRegisterPollingHandler, SIUnregisterPollingHandler, __DVDStoreErrorCode, PSMTXRotTrig, and PSMTXQuat.
smart_moves: Chose the closest existing decompilation source rather than rewriting from scratch: SMS-decomp was selected because it was already matched, stylistically similar, and required minimal changes.
Did not force a single upstream source for every subsystem; Odemu was taken from oot-gc when SMS lacked it.
Converted objects to Matching only alongside source/header/symbol updates, preserving build-system evidence that the port actually matched.
Replaced raw SRAM byte indexing in dvderror with a named OSSramEx field, making the code both more type-safe and closer to SDK intent.
Preserved the Dolphin SDK C-versus-paired-single API pattern by adding C_ and PS variants plus macro aliases instead of flattening names.
Split anonymous data blobs into individual strings and typed objects in symbols.txt, improving future rodata/data matching and searchability.
Used paired-single inline assembly/register-sensitive implementations for low-level MTX/VEC routines where C alone would not be sufficient for exact codegen.
decomp_lessons: For vendor SDK code, compare against multiple sibling decomp projects and prefer the source whose codegen and style are closest to the target project; here SMS was best for most Dolphin code, while oot-gc was better for Odemu.
A successful port often requires synchronized edits across source, headers, config object status, and symbols.txt; changing only the C file is not enough.
When a raw memory offset is understood, encode it into the struct layout. The OSSramEx dvdErrorCode field replaced sramPtr[36] and made __DVDStoreErrorCode clearer.

Header include order can affect type visibility for SDK APIs. Moving __OSInterrupt, OSInterruptMask, and __OSInterruptHandler into os.h before OSContext-dependent declarations avoided local duplication in OSInterrupt.h.
Preserve SDK naming layers: public generic macros like VECMag/MTXRotTrig should dispatch to C_ or PS implementations depending on build mode.
Symbol file precision matters for matching. Resizing, renaming, and typing data labels can expose real object boundaries and avoid treating multiple strings or arrays as one blob.
Inline paired-single assembly remains an appropriate tactic for Dolphin MTX/VEC functions where exact instruction selection and register use are part of the match.
naming_conventions: Paired-single implementations use PS-prefixed names such as PSVECMag and PSMTXRotTrig.
C fallback implementations use C_-prefixed names such as C_VECMag and C_MTXRotTrig.
Generic public names such as VECMag and MTXRotTrig are macros selecting C_ or PS variants, matching the existing Dolphin mtx.h pattern.

OSSerial BSS labels were upgraded from address-derived OSSerial_804A7EF8-style names to semantic names: XferTime, TypeCallback, RDSTHandler, InputBufferValid, InputBuffer, InputBufferVcount, and cmdFixDevice.
Odemu API prototypes use DB/DBG/Hu naming from the SDK/decomp source: DBRead, DBWrite, DBInitInterrupts, DBQueryData, DBOpen, DBClose, Hu_IsStub.
DVD error conversion was split into a static helper named Convert plus the exported __DVDStoreErrorCode.
The symbol table renamed VECMag at 0x80342DFC to PSVECMag, indicating the actual implementation was the paired-single variant.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: PSMTXRotTrig was implemented with register parameters and inline PowerPC paired-single assembly, including ps_neg, psq_st, ps_merge00, and axis dispatch via lowercase-or operation.
PSVECMag was added as an asm float routine in vec.c, matching the paired-single vector magnitude implementation instead of a generic C version.
MTX/VEC matching relied on keeping C and PS entry points distinct while using header macros to preserve public API names.
dvderror matching improved by extracting status/error conversion into a small static Convert helper, matching upstream structure and making __DVDStoreErrorCode simpler.
Data matching involved symbols.txt adjustments: splitting string blobs, adding data:float tags, resizing arrays/objects, and giving BSS regions semantic names.

review_feedback.feedback: The author explicitly justified the port source choice: most remaining Dolphin code was very similar to already matched SMS-decomp code, while Odemu matched oot-gc because SMS did not have it.
Reported matched code increased by +0.33% / +12676 bytes and linked code increased by +0.51% / +19924 bytes.
Reported 40 new matches, with large wins in VIConfigure, OSSerial transfer/type handlers, Odemu DB/DBG routines, OSResetSW, __OSReboot, __DVDStoreErrorCode, PSMTXRotTrig, and PSMTXQuat.
No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that match or port THPDec after PR 1775.
Find later PRs that address the remaining unmatched MSL logf function.
Search for follow-up changes to OSSerial BSS names XferTime, TypeCallback, RDSTHandler, InputBuffer, InputBufferVcount, or cmdFixDevice.
Search for later cleanup around C_/PS mtx and vec macro aliases, especially VECMag and MTXRotTrig.
Search for PRs that further adjust OSSramEx layout or dvdErrorCode handling.
Search for other PRs that port Dolphin SDK code from SMS-decomp, oot-gc, or MKDD.
